name: Sx126X → Set Mode Sleep
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sets the `sx126x` mode to sleep. By default the radio enters warm sleep — config registers are retained so that on wake it is ready for `sx126x.set_mode_rx` / `sx126x.set_mode_tx` again. For battery-powered nodes that pair the radio with deep sleep, `cold: true` switches to cold sleep (~0.6 µA, vs ~600 µA warm). Cold sleep does not retain config, so the radio must be reinitialized on wake. With deep sleep this happens automatically — the device reboots on wake and the component reinitializes the radio during startup.

config_entries.label: Cold
config_entries.description: If true, enter cold sleep instead of warm sleep. Defaults to `false`.
